name: lety-skill-hub
description: Internal marketplace of Claude Code plugins for the Lety AI team

plugins.name: linear-task
plugins.description: Create Linear issues with user story, Gherkin acceptance criteria, and Definition of Done

plugins.name: linear-report
plugins.description: Generate weekly activity reports from Linear grouped by project, milestone, and contributor

plugins.name: pr-develop
plugins.description: Create a PR from a feature/fix/chore branch to develop following GitFlow and Conventional Commits

plugins.name: pr-staging
plugins.description: Cut a release branch, bump version to RC, and create a PR to staging following GitFlow and semver

plugins.name: pr-production
plugins.description: Strip RC suffix and create a PR from staging to master for production release following GitFlow

plugins.name: typeorm
plugins.description: TypeORM best practices for NestJS + DataSource (0.3.x): no raw SQL, Repository/QueryBuilder only, relations via TypeORM options, migrations via CLI

plugins.name: nest-module
plugins.description: Scaffold a complete NestJS module for Lety 2.0 Backend: entity, DTOs, module, gRPC controller, service with BaseRpcException, unit test and mock factory

plugins.name: entity-dto
plugins.description: Generate a TypeORM entity + Create/Update DTOs for Lety 2.0 Backend following official best practices — flags existing code issues

plugins.name: gateway-controller
plugins.description: Scaffold a complete API Gateway feature: proto service + interface files, REST controller with Swagger/Permissions, gRPC service with lastValueFrom, and NestJS module with ClientsModule.registerAsync

plugins.name: test-scaffold
plugins.description: Generate unit tests for NestJS services — minimal mocks, getRepositoryToken, mock factory with EntityLike type, gRPC status code assertions

plugins.name: migration-helper
plugins.description: Guide TypeORM migration workflow — generate, review, run, revert and register migrations across tenant/platform/auth schemas

plugins.name: error-handler
plugins.description: Write, review or fix error handling — BaseRpcException with correct gRPC status codes, TypeORM exception filters, RpcToHttpInterceptor mapping, RabbitMQ ack/nack patterns

plugins.name: security-review
plugins.description: Review JWT strategies, auth guards, middleware, and security config — flags vulnerabilities against NestJS docs and OWASP best practices
